name: Raspberry-Lemon Curd
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh lemon juice (from about 6 lemons)
2 sticks butter (not margarine), weighing about half a pound
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 14 jars of 8 oz.
1. Wash and sterilize the jars. Have lids and rings ready.
2. Combine all ingredients in a heavy, 6-quart pan.
3. Stirring constantly, bring the mixture to a simmer over medium-high heat.
4. When the mixture begins to simmer, immediately reduce the heat to low.
5. Simmer for 12-15 minutes until the mixture thickens and sheets from a spoon.
6. Remove the pan from the heat and fill jars, leaving about half an inch of head room.
7. Adjust lids and rings.
8. Process the jars in a boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
9. Refrigerate after opening; it will keep for several weeks after opening.
This makes a lovely dessert when gently heated and poured over a scoop of ice cream on a slice of lemon pound cake. Garnish with fresh raspberries.
